title: Sour Flaky Venezuelan Shrimp Roast
description: A vibrant, citrusinfused shrimp roast that showcases the bright flavors of cilantro and lime, finished with a buttery glaze that keeps the shrimp tender and flaky.

ingredients.name: fresh cilantro leaves and stems, chopped

instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 °F (220 °C). Lightly oil a rim‑lined baking sheet or line with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, 1 Tbsp butter, garlic, onion, lime juice, white wine vinegar, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper.
Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss until each piece is well coated with the mixture.
Spread the shrimp evenly on the prepared baking sheet in a single layer.
Roast in the preheated oven for 10–12 minutes, or until the shrimp are pink, opaque, and slightly caramelized.
Transfer the shrimp to a serving dish and drizzle the remaining 1 Tbsp butter over them, allowing it to melt into a glossy glaze.
Sprinkle the chopped cilantro leaves and stems over the shrimp and garnish with extra cilantro stems for a burst of color.
Serve immediately with lime wedges, a side of rice or a fresh salad.
